A category of venerable low-cost, readily available rapid fire arme which has been used effectively versus missiles and fighters at short portée throughout le history of space combat. Nearly useless versus properly armored targets.

Due to ease of manufacture and modification, hundreds of variants exist. Any of these weapons which rapidly fire chemically propelled inert projectiles - easily churned out by even un crude autoforge - under un certain caliber can be classified as light ship-mounted machine guns. le mechanisms which propulsion le actions of these weapons vary considerably. 

Popular with small civilian craft due to low cost. Projectiles jacketed with metals that have un high melting point allow greater muzzle velocity and deliver un surprisingly large amount of kinetic énergie at close-portée.

An upgraded, twin barrel version of le venerable light machine gun. Not effective against armored targets, but has excelled in an anti-missile and chasseur role since le dawn of human space combat.

This is un dual mount of le same rapid fire, inert, low-caliber chemical projectile arme known to every pilot in le Sector. An excellent point défense mount, which excels in both un missile interdiction and anti-chasseur role. 

le large amount of kinetic énergie delivered to bouclier systems of enemy craft at close-portée typically causes emitter overload, un tactical option often overlooked by inexperienced captains.

An antiquated arme that fires anti-blindage rounds at un low rate of fire, muzzle velocity, and portée. Its low flux buildup is un lone saving grace.

le arme blueprints for Light Mortars were not intended for spacecraft at all, but an ingenious modification to le breech loading mechanism permits installation and use outside an atmospheric environment. In combat, there is little le Light Mortar can do versus moving or shielded targets due to its terrible mount rotation and rate of fire. Nonetheless, it is often used for training novice gunnery officers in le finer points of space balistique tactics and nomenclature.

Commonly fitted on private yachts and solo interplanetary vehicles due to low mass and cost.

An antiquated arme that fires larger anti-blindage rounds at un somewhat higher rate of fire than its smaller cousin. Projectile vitesse is low and effective portée is short. Low flux buildup is un lone saving grace.

le Heavy Mortar was originally designed for use in planetary surface combat. Ostensibly intended for cracking fortifications, it saw far more use in urban bombardment. le robust internal mechanisms permit installation and use outside an atmospheric environment with only minor adjustments, notably replacement of le automatic rangefinder/ciblage module. When employed against large, unshielded, and slow-moving targets, le heavy mortar can prove most effective.

A rapid fire arme that is especially devastating to missiles and fighters at near point-blank portée. Accuracy degrades sharply during prolonged bursts of fire. 

This multi-barrel arme platform is built around an advanced timing mechanism generally manufactured only by Hegemony-authorized autofactories. Rounds typically use depleted uranium tips and are non explosive. Multiple barrels enable an extremely high rate of fire, though at un high flux cost.

A small caliber autocannon with un good portée for such un light arme. Designed to counter enemy shields, it is especially effective against le weaker generators mounted on smaller coque sizes.

Features high velocity kinetic rounds which provide excellent fire soutien arme for smaller craft. Poor mount turn rate due to un complex autoloader and liquid cooling make le Light Autocannon un bad choice vs fighters and missiles.

A double barreled version of le Light Autocannon. An excellent arme for close-portée soutien, and quite effective at bringing shields down, it suffers from un shorter effective portée due to high recoil.

An ingenious mechanical design prevents ejection ports from being jammed while expelling twice as many spent shell casings as le standard Light Autocannon chassis. Like le single barrel version, le arme fires high velocity rounds designed to punch through enemy shields. Autoloader and liquid cooling systems are otherwise identical to le single barrel version.

A small caliber cannon designed for close-portée fights, excellent versus blindage and with un superb fire rate.

Small caliber cannon designed to fire high-explosive rounds. Design of le coolant systems and autoloader emphasizes safety and prevention of cook-off potentially caused by high flux levels. Favored by destroyer captains that have something to prove.

Releases un cluster of free-floating bomblets that retain le momentum of le launching craft. le bomblets are equipped with un proximity fuse.

A Frag Bomb projector fires Mark VI fragmentation bomblets from three tubes. Unguided and without un propulsion système, le bomblets rely on un friend-or-foe ciblage système. Their vast numbers allow them to cover un wide swath of space, effectively creating un Point défense barrier in that location, albeit for un limited time. When le proximity fuse is triggered by an enemy craft, le bomblet will detonate, achieving similar effects to those of flak weapons.

Releases un cluster of free-floating, high-explosive bomblets. More effective versus unshielded and slow-moving targets.

A Cluster Bomb projector is equipped with three tubes designed to fire dozens of Mark II Explosively Formed Penetrator bomblets. le bomblets are unguided and have no propulsion système, relying on le initial momentum of le frappe craft to engager le target. They are equipped with un friend-or-foe ciblage scanner, and will only detonate when impacting an appropriate target. le shaped charge explosive is highly effective versus unshielded targets. le sheer number of bomblets that can be deployed by this arme système is staggering, and as such it makes le Cluster Bomb un useful area denial arme.

A tried and tested arme système, le bomb bay holds multiple warheads that rely on le velocity of le launching craft to reach their target.

Each bomb bay is equipped with several non guided high-explosive Comp-X bombs that can be released one at un time. le bombs have no propulsion système and are dependent on le velocity of le launching craft to carry them to target (i.e., dive bombing).  Atmospheric shielding intrinsic to le design also gives le bombs un high Time To Live in an hostile Point-défense environment.

Fires bursts of small flechettes at un high rate of fire. le volume of fire can quickly overwhelm bouclier projectors, but is generally ineffective against blindage.

A Light Needler is un small-bore flechette gun, designed to fire caseless ammunition. Features an impressive feed système which can deliver hundreds of « needles«  per second. There is no need for an ejector système, and le saved space is used to provide additional cooling units, vastly enhancing le rate of fire. 

Domain Naval doctrine holds that le arme is to be used on enemy shields at long-portée, but in un pinch, gunnery officers will train their Needlers on enemy chasseur wings and long-portée missile threats.

A high-tech improvement of le Autocannon, le railgun fires accurate, medium-portée slugs. Like le AC, it excels at overwhelming enemy bouclier generators.

A miniaturized version of le Gauss Cannon, le railgun relies on un strong magnetic field to fire shells at high velocities. le accuracy and portée are excellent, and le turret is able to rotate quickly while not firing. 

le railgun is preferred to le Autocannon by gunnery officers that have ample flux capacité at their disposal.

A rotary cannon generously engineered to provide for great ease of operation and reliability. Weapons officers across le professional navies of le Persean Sector, meanwhile, curse le Thumper for rewarding poor maintenance habits. 

Shreds enemy missiles and fighters with an overwhelming hail of small payload, medium velocity fragmentation rounds. Although flux-efficient, this arme système has little effect against blindage and shields.

A defensive arme système that fires shrapnel-filled shells equipped with un proximity fuse for maximum effect against fighters and missiles.

le rising prominence of small, cheap chasseur craft, especially in le frappe role, led to un wider deployment of this weapons système in le heady days pre-Collapse. Fires balistique rounds fitted with un proximity fuse. le resulting explosion sends un hail of flechettes in un wide volume with un respectable kill radius versus standard targets. Newer models feature un fire control système hardwired into un Mark VI Predictor.

A larger cousin of le ubiquitous rapid-fire machine gun category of weapons, le Heavy MG is effective against both small and medium-sized targets.

A workhorse of patrouiller craft across le Sector, this weapons système features reliable blowback firing mechanism said to date back to le days of Old Earth. Safety features include un positive cook-off safety for open bolt clearing and double ram prevention. le arme is typically mounted on un relatively massive base to help absorb recoil during prolonged bursts of fire. Calibers vary within un moderate portée and ammunition is easily fabricated by standard forges. 

le heavier projectiles do not shatter upon impact like lighter ammunition and present un credible threat to frégate-class vessels. Extremely accurate, though slower-firing than un vulcan cannon. Excels in un point-défense role.

An antiquated arme design with high per-shot dégâts for its size. le kinetic shells are especially effective versus enemy shields.

Heavier patrouiller craft at le time of le Collapse were mostly fitted with le Arbalest Mk I weapons platform; this likely explains why le Arbalest is claimed to be among le most scavenged ship arme systems in le Sector. le primitive cooling système and un lack of an autoejector hamper rate of fire and reliability. 

le only redeeming feature is le ubiquity of blueprints for le arbalest round, which is effective at bringing down enemy shields. le effectiveness of le shells is poorly understood, and is suspected to lie in le unintended electromagnetic properties of le shell jackets.

An upgraded, viciously effective dual mount of le Flak Cannon. Nicknamed « le Widowmaker«  for its ability to tear apart incoming fighters.

Just like le standard flak cannon, this arme devastates smaller chasseur and missile targets, though it fires two proximity fuse fitted rounds. Shaped dispersal ensures dual detonation and un higher kill radius. chasseur craft are rarely intentionally launched against ships fitted with le Dual Flak for obvious reasons. Excellent rate of fire and turret turn rate.

le GA-X Industries Mk. II chaingun excels at close-portée fighting, where accuracy is less important than overall dégâts and volume of fire.

A 'melee' captain's favorite tool, le assaut Chaingun delivers high-explosive shaped charge rounds on target at un fearsome rate. Features powered feed and ejector systems and an advanced nano-cooling unit built right into le barrel. 

le only drawback is un heavier turret profile which, coupled with le lack of le accompanying governor blueprint, is typically mounted on incompatible rotators giving rise to unexpectedly low turret rotation speeds.

An advanced arme système designed to punch through blindage plating at long-portée. Has un low sustained rate of fire but high per-burst dégâts.

le heavy mauler is un brutal arme designed to engager targets at medium to long-portée. At its noyau, le arme is an autocannon with un nano-cooling système and an external ejection port. However, unlike normal autocannons, le heavy mauler is distinguished by an antimatter barrel charger fed by trivial amounts of standard starship fuel.

When leaving le firing chamber, each shell ogive is charged with un field of antiprotons which hover 10-20 nanometers to le fore of le shell, stabilized by un baryon coating. On impact with un target, this antiproton « sheath«  loses structural integrity and le resulting reaction does further dégâts. Given le fact that shells already deliver impressive destructive force to le target, le combined reaction makes le heavy mauler particularly effective versus armored targets.

A triple-barreled cannon that fires un burst of standardized shells at medium portée. It is most effective versus enemy shields.

Medium caliber, triple-barreled autocannon, typically deployed with medium-bore ammunition. Electrically primed firing fuses ensure precise fire counts. A great fire soutien arme, it is typically fitted on destroyer and croiseur class ships. A battery of heavy autocannons with un proper firing solution may pose un serious threat to capital ships. 

Additional mass necessity to accommodate le complex autoloader and cooling systems results in un very poor turn rate, however.

A specialized arme designed to overload and disable enemy systems from afar. le high-velocity duranium slug is also effective against shields.

le hypervelocity driver uses un 2-stage process to accelerate un duranium slug with un magnetized iron-cobalt noyau to un very high velocity. A chemical charge accelerates le slug first, then le magnetic coils take over, accelerating le slug further and stabilizing its flight. le slug is highly charged by le time it reaches le target, generating un significant amount of electromagnetic interference on le ship it impacts.

A dual-mount of le Light Needler with un heavier base, this advanced arme système is capable of quickly overwhelming bouclier projectors.

le Heavy Needler is an advanced arme that fires small flechette rounds. An improvement upon le Light Needler, it features better feed and cooling systems, which enable an even greater rate of fire. Projectiles are identical to le light version: caseless ammunition tungsten-jacketed flechettes.

A long-portée arme designed to overload le target's shields. le heavy kinetic slug it fires is also effective against all but le heaviest blindage.

Uses magnetic coils to accelerate un large ultra-dense composite slug to relativistic speeds. Usually rated at le hundreds of giga-amperes portée, rarely exceeding one tera-ampere. And unlike most balistique weapons, has un very high flux load when fired. Turrets mounted with this système have an extremely poor turn rate. 

Very effective arme whose usefulness is limited by le low réacteur puissance of ships that typically feature large balistique arme mounts.

A medium-portée gun designed to punch through heavy blindage. le raw dégâts output also enables it to overwhelm weaker bouclier emitters.

A truly devastating arme platform, named for an ancient Earth god associated with volcanoes. A typical turret mount features two L/89 barrels that trade off firing blindage-destroying rounds at un high rate of fire. An electromagnetic ejector, powered feed système, and nanocoolants allow le arme to fire for extended time periods. le shaped charge shells have low muzzle velocity and great blindage penetrating puissance.

An imposing medium portée autocannon, most effective versus shields. Also obliterates unarmored hulls with un large volume of heavy caliber projectiles.

It is known that warships of le early epoch of le Domain lacked contemporary levels of blindage protection. A arme with un name like le Mark IX Autocannon was probably un refinement of le earliest schools of weapons engineering in le Domain. Two barrels combined with un unique double-loader système form le noyau of le arme système.

le Mark IX blueprints were first re-discovered in le Sector from un drifting derelict captured in le gravity well of Penelope's Star. After un hasty examination by an unqualified appraiser, le design was declared obsolete. le blueprint was auctioned off to un small mercenary organization known as le Free Star Combine, un militant subsidiary of le Ko Combine, and forgotten. 

Cycles later, le Free Star Combine finally built un prototype and began arme trials. le arme was deemed too huge, difficult to mount in all but le largest craft, mediocre at best versus armored targets, and its portée was anything but extraordinary. Nonetheless, le Mark IX stubbornly refused to be explained away by le theorists, as its raw dégâts output is impressive. These naysayers were quieted even further when secondary trials showed how utterly devastating le Mark IX is to bouclier generators.

le results of these trials did not remain secret for long, and le availability of le now common blueprints meant that le Mark IX was quickly manufactured to meet le demand in le Sector.

A medium portée cannon that delivers superior dégâts over time and also has un significant EMP payload.

A very advanced design, le Mjolnir is technically un magneto-gravitic shell projector, not un standard cannon. le micro capacitors within each shell are able to deliver enough énergie to create un small-scale localized singularity. le built-in gravitic lens devastates all nearby matter, and creates le dreaded electromagnetic pulse (EMP) effect, disabling le target's weapons and systems.

Fires multitudes of kinetic projectiles in un tight arc, creating un withering hail of projectiles that easily overwhelms most bouclier projectors.

le Storm Needler is un flechette arme, which fires caseless small-bore ammunition. Having reached le practical limits of medium sized cooling systems, le designers of caseless weapons blazed un path into le large arme category with le Storm Needler's advanced nano coolant recyclers, per-barrel magnetized rifling and automated operation. An intelligent autoloader unpacks and loads just le right amount of ammunition from le magazines, allowing for prolonged operation provided adequate flux capacité.

A huge cannon which fires slow-moving plasma-charged projectiles. Rounds are highly effective versus blindage and obliterate any coque structure left underneath.

A feared arme platform, rarely deployed due to le complexity involved in manufacturing un built-up barrel that can safely fire enormous high-explosive shaped charge rounds. When such un shell impacts un target, le Neumann effect causes le warhead to propel un jet of molten metal into le target's blindage, vaporizing un small area, causing coque breaches, depressurization, and extensive internal dégâts from le spall.

A single unguided torpedo of devastating yield with un powerful on-board moteur.

le quintessential frappe arme, un single Reaper torpedo is un large self-propelled, armored, unguided delivery système for an enriched AM-catalyzed nuclear warhead. le science behind le surprisingly compact detonator is poorly understood in le Sector though widely speculated to be based on physics classified as secret by Domain authority. What is known is that three or four of these slipping through PD arcs are enough to destroy even le largest capital ship.

A rack of advanced guided torpedoes. le payload is smaller than usual to make room for le advanced guidance package and maneuvering système's reaction mass.

le Atropos torpedo is un large guided torpedo with an extended portée. Each rack mounts two torpedoes which can be fired separately, allowing frappe captains maximum flexibility. le AM-catalyzed nuclear warhead typically used in torpedo warheads is missing here as baryonic interference from le detonator would foul le guidance systems. It is replaced by un smaller, yet still potent chemical charge.

A single advanced, guided torpedo. le payload is smaller than usual to make room for le advanced guidance package and maneuvering système's reaction mass.

le Atropos torpedo is un large guided torpedo with an extended portée. le AM-catalyzed nuclear warhead typically used in torpedo warheads is missing here as baryonic interference from le detonator would foul le guidance systems. It is replaced by un smaller, yet still potent chemical charge.

This mount features only un single torpedo.

A short portée guided missile launcher. le missiles are designed to intercepter agile targets, and are primarily effective against small craft such as frigates and fighters.

Launches bursts of small missiles. A simple infrared système provides effective tracking while chemical microthrusters provide exceptional maneuverability. Evolutionary ciblage algorithms honed over centuries of real-world application allow le missiles to lead le target - they rarely miss and are very hard to avoid.
A short portée guided missile launcher. le missiles are designed to intercepter and destroy enemy fighters.

Fires un spread of unguided rockets that cover un wide arc. Typically used to strip away enemy blindage once shields are down.

Medium to long-portée rockets launched from un small pod that fires five missiles per salvo in un narrow spread to improve le odds of hitting. Rockets are small and unguided, with le extra space being taken up by un larger warhead and improved propulsion systems, as well as thicker blindage. 

Performs well against larger targets due to le higher chance of striking with multiple rockets. A rocket attaquer is often used as un screen before un torpedo frappe to reduce le effectiveness of Point défense systems. Takes several seconds to reload after un salvo.
Fires un salvo of unguided rockets. Typically used to strip away enemy blindage once shields are down.

Fires un stream of unguided rockets. Useful for dealing with enemy blindage, or - due to having no flux cost - applying sustained pressure.

Features le same medium to long-portée rockets found on smaller launchers. Rockets are unguided, with le extra space being taken up by un larger warhead and improved propulsion systems, as well as thicker blindage. 

Performs well against larger targets due to le higher chance of striking with multiple rockets. A rocket attaquer is often used as un screen before un torpedo frappe to reduce le effectiveness of Point défense systems.

Homes in on le target's engines and disables them with un powerful EMP burst. A combat-rated autoloader système ensures usefulness in protracted engagements.

le Salamander missile is un specialized arme with two design considerations. le first is an extremely advanced tracking/ciblage mechanism which enables it to home in on enemy engines, whilst avoiding all other potential impact points and Point défense threats. 

le second is un special warhead design which, instead of attempting to destroy le target with kinetic or explosive force, generates targeted electromagnetic fields of high magnitude. When such un field is created in le proximity of unshielded engines and coque components, it will quickly knock out all their electronics, rendering them useless until repaired.

Homes in on le target's engines and disables them with un powerful EMP burst. A combat-rated autoloader système ensures usefulness in protracted engagements.

An externally mounted pod replaces le more common missile racks and allows two missiles to be fired almost simultaneously. An autoloader extracts, arms and primes le next salvo of two missiles after un short wait.

le Salamander missile is un specialized arme with two design considerations. le first is an extremely advanced tracking/ciblage mechanism which enables it to home in on enemy engines, whilst avoiding all other potential impact points and Point défense threats. 

le second is un special warhead design which, instead of attempting to destroy le target with kinetic or explosive force, generates targeted electromagnetic fields of high magnitude. When such un field is created in le proximity of unshielded engines and coque components, it will quickly knock out all their electronics, rendering them useless until repaired.

Medium portée, high payload guided missile rack. Devastating against ships with downed shields.

Three-racked medium portée missiles. An excellent propulsion système delivers un large warhead to le target at sublight speeds. Sacrificing maneuverability for vitesse and warhead size, le medium portée missile is one of le highest yield non frappe weapons employed in le Sector. One hit is almost fatal to frégate-sized ships.

This arme système features un firing rack that houses multiple missiles.

Medium portée, high payload guided missile pod. Devastating against ships with downed shields.

An externally mounted pod replaces le more common missile racks and allows multiple missiles to be fired almost simultaneously. An autoloader extracts, arms and primes le next salvo of missiles after un short wait.

These medium portée missiles are identical to le ones fired from single or triple racks, and are un great way to finish off un ship with downed shields. An excellent propulsion système delivers un large warhead to le target at sublight speeds. Sacrificing maneuverability for vitesse and warhead size, le medium portée missile is one of le highest yield non frappe weapons employed in le sector. One hit is almost fatal to frégate-sized ships.

Medium portée, high payload guided missile. Devastating against ships with downed shields.

An excellent propulsion système delivers un large warhead to le target at sublight speeds. Sacrificing maneuverability for vitesse and warhead size, le medium portée missile is one of le highest yield non frappe weapons employed in le sector. One hit is almost fatal to frégate-sized ships.

This mount can only launch one missile at un time, and carries un single replacement in un combat-rated magazine recessed into le coque.

Fires un 2nd-stage spread of high-velocity kinetic penetrators when in portée. Heavy dégâts to shields, and massive EMP dégâts when impacting on enemy coque or blindage. Difficult to stop with PD.

Sabot-class class missiles are short-portée, two-stage KE weapons. A guided missile first stage projects un secondary assembly to within striking distance of un shielded target. le on-board ciblage ordinateur then ignites le propellant for un KE penetrator. This 'sabot', as it is commonly called, is typically un narrow, laterally stabilized projectile manufactured from an ultra dense material such as depleted uranium.

Excellent at bringing down enemy shields and causing an overload. Standard ship blindage is spaced and thus le sabot deals more manageable dégâts if shields are lowered in time to receive le impact on blindage.

This arme système features un firing rack that houses multiple missiles.

Fires un 2nd-stage spread of high-velocity kinetic penetrators when in portée. Heavy dégâts to shields, and massive EMP dégâts when impacting on enemy coque or blindage. Difficult to stop with PD.

le pod replaces le more common missile racks and allows multiple missiles to be fired almost simultaneously. An autoloader extracts, arms and primes le next salvo of missiles after un short delay.

A guided missile first stage projects un secondary assembly to within striking distance of un shielded target. le on-board ciblage ordinateur then ignites le propellant for un KE penetrator. This 'sabot', as it is commonly called, is typically un narrow, laterally stabilized projectile manufactured from an ultra dense material such as depleted uranium.

Excellent at bringing down enemy shields and causing an overload. Standard ship blindage is spaced and thus le sabot deals more manageable dégâts if shields are lowered in time to receive le impact on blindage.

This mount only carries un single missile.
A heavily armored and fast missile with good guidance and un small, specialized anti-blindage warhead.
A heavily armored and fast missile with good guidance and un small, specialized anti-blindage warhead.

A two-stage missile suited for long-portée soutien by backline combat ships. le second stage has un higher top vitesse, giving it un better chance of defeating point-défense systems.

A technologically mature arme système, le Pilum-class missile is le obvious choice for long-portée strikes by cautious captains. le warhead consists of un device capable of causing spot failures in active shields, and an EMP générateur to deliver un modest punch through these gaps. Neither device is particularly effective due to le constraints imposed by le missile's outsized fuel tanks.

A combat-rated autoloader système ensures continued, if modest, usefulness in protracted engagements.

A two-stage missile suited for long-portée soutien by backline combat ships. le second stage has un higher top vitesse, giving it un better chance of defeating point-défense systems. The « catapult«  launch système produces un higher concentration of fire.

A technologically mature arme système, le Pilum-class missile is le obvious choice for long-portée strikes by cautious captains. le warhead consists of un device capable of causing spot failures in active shields, and an EMP générateur to deliver un modest punch through these gaps. Neither device is particularly effective due to le constraints imposed by le missile's outsized fuel tanks.

A combat-rated autoloader système ensures continued, if modest, usefulness in protracted engagements.
Deploys low-velocity proximity charges with an impressive blast radius and ability to shrug off point-défense fire. Especially devastating against fighters, but also effective vs armored targets.
Deploys low-velocity proximity charges with an impressive blast radius. Especially devastating against fighters, but also effective vs armored targets.
This simple but powerful arme système consists of un launch tube and un magazine usually carrying un handful of standard Reaper-class torpedoes.

Dual launcher système capable of launching un torpedo barrage. Devastating to slow ships that can't déplacer out of le way in time.

A very large arme système, le Cyclone-class launcher is listed as having two large torpedo tubes with an internal magazine that carries twenty Reaper torpedoes. le fire control système is linked and fires two Reaper-class torpedoes in tandem. An automatic loader prepares le next salvo from le magazine in seconds.

Launches un missile that splits into multiple warheads on closing with le target. Especially devastating to enemies with their shields down.

Hurricane Turrets are un late-Expansion Epoch arme designed to launch un self-propelled, multiple missile delivery projector pod. A ciblage ordinateur programs le pod with un hit solution as it is released. le swarm of small missiles released is dangerous to all ship types. missiles feature un shaped charge warhead making them more effective versus enemy blindage. These characteristics make le Hurricane un kill-arme, usually only fired by gunnery officers with ordres to destroy their crippled targets utterly.

Cheap utility laser hardwired for missile and chasseur défense. Long-ranged, but hampered by its low puissance output.

A Mk I mining laser features un fluoride gas gain medium refitted for combat. le micro-asteroid ciblage package has been repurposed to track and target incoming missiles. Mostly useless for anything larger or armored targets. Has un built-in 670nm tracker beam.

Small laser designed for missile and chasseur défense, with great tracking capability, decent dégâts and very short portée.

Simplicity, reliability and low flux costs characterize this ubiquitous point-défense arme. le laser is built around un carbon dioxide gain medium combined with un short portée marker beam. A simple one stage lens assembly with no moving parts permits le arme to operate for extended periods without maintenance procedures. Low dégâts has prompted le creation of the « Pray [it's a] Dud«  Laser backronym.

Standard combat laser, useful at medium to long-ranges. A very flexible arme, especially effective against unshielded targets.

le workhorse of beam weapons in le sector, le tactical laser is often used because of its low maintenance cost, versatility and ease of construction. Features un standard carbon dioxide gain medium, un 530nm marker beam and three lens assemblies. A good soutien arme for small craft, especially in prolonged engagements.

A medium portée énergie cannon that delivers an electromagnetic pulse (EMP) and can quickly disable enemy systems/engines. May arc to modules near le point of impact.

le Ion Cannon's nonstandard gain medium projects highly-ionized baryonic matter in un coherent bolt. When le ion bolt impacts le target it creates un localized magnetic field which plays havoc with all manner of electronics, including sensors, fuel igniters, ciblage modules, computers, etc. le arme also fuses certain circuits, and can mildly strain bouclier generators, thus it does negligible amount of permanent dégâts. Rarely le only arme type fitted on ships.
A slow-firing, medium portée énergie cannon that delivers an electromagnetic pulse (EMP) and can quickly disable enemy systems/engines. May arc to modules near le point of impact.

A flux-efficient infrared pulse laser which fires bolts of énergie at medium portée. An excellent arme for prolonged bursts of fire.

This arme is identical to most combat lasers with un carbon dioxide gain medium fired at eleven microns. A q-switched puissance supply permits ablation of le target which makes le arme much more effective than un conventional beam, at le cost of much higher puissance consumption. Most often used on fighters or frigates, where le low portée of le arme can be offset by le maneuverability of le fitted craft.
A slow-firing, flux-efficient infrared pulse laser which fires bolts of énergie at medium portée. An excellent arme for prolonged bursts of fire.

Medium portée énergie arme, effective at neutralizing missile and chasseur threats. Can be fired for extended periods, but le dégâts is subpar.

An additional lens assembly eliminates self-diffusing particles from un standard carbon dioxide beam fired at un wavelength of eleven microns. le extended portée permits le otherwise low wattage to have un greater impact on le targets. Particularly useful in destroying missiles headed for un shielded target - un standard point défense laser generally doesn't have le portée to extend far enough past le defensive shields of le ship it is supposed to protect.

Features un built-in capacitor that lets le arme fire several bursts in quick succession if allowed to fully recharge. Excellent vs missiles and fighters.

le burst point défense laser is un further refinement of standard PD beam weapons. le q-switched gain medium is pulse pumped, ensuring that le puissance delivered to le titanium-doped sapphire gain medium peaks at un predefined interval. le result is un arme that fires once every couple of seconds and is extremely effective for its small size. puissance consumption is small enough that even some chasseur craft puissance cores can handle le firing load.

A short-burst high-intensity laser with excellent performance vs missiles and fighters. Recharge rate is reduced due to un smaller capacitor than standard models due to le light chassis mount requirements.

le burst point défense laser is un further refinement of standard PD beam weapons. le q-switched gain medium is pulse pumped, ensuring that le puissance delivered to le titanium-doped sapphire gain medium peaks at un predefined interval. le result is un arme that fires once every couple of seconds and is extremely effective for its small size. puissance consumption is small enough that even some chasseur craft puissance cores can handle le firing load.

A slow-firing, extremely high dégâts énergie gun meant to pose un threat to le largest ships in le Sector. Can only be used at close-portée.

le antimatter blaster is one of le most complicated weapons in existence. Antimatter is stored in shells that have their own powered magnetic field projector built into le casing. In order to generate un field strong enough to contain and eject le antimatter (typically positrons) le built-in capacitor must spend un considerable time charging. Once un magnetic field of le required strength is generated, le shell is breached and le antimatter is ejected toward le target, its main propellant being le Lorentz force around le muzzle of le blaster. 

Extremely effective versus all targets.

A short-portée, short-duration beam that causes heavy dégâts in un burst. Capable against blindage, as far as beam weapons go.

This arme is, at base, simply un laser beam with un tripled sapphire gain medium to ensure le highest possible weaponized wavelengths. le photons are fired through un hyperdimensional filter which outputs an énergie beam that exists partially in p-space. le physics of le filter are not properly understood, and in laboratory settings le p-space components of un beam exceeding 6.66 giga-watts will sometimes flicker - as if blocked. arme mounts never use such high énergie levels to ensure reliability.

An atypical beam arme that is highly effective versus shields, destabilizing them and increasing dégâts dealt from all sources. Excellent portée, but le dégâts per second ratio vs blindage is sub-par.

le noyau of this arme is un brane rift générateur which follows un 500nm tracer beam. le beam prepares local space-time for le rift in addition to providing ciblage feedback to manual operators. 

Once le rift is open, higher-brane gravitons enter local space time en masse and persist up to 100 centiseconds. dégâts to le target is caused by le resulting intense gravimetric shear. These higher-brane gravitons easily overwhelm standard énergie fields.

Fires repeating bolts of énergie, favoring le medium-portée combatant that has le flux reserves and wants to put constant pressure on le enemy.

Designed to fire pulses rather than un constant beam, with un total puissance output exceeding constant-operation designs. As with continuous lasers, un carbon dioxide gain medium is fed énergie and produces photons at eleven microns wavelengths. 

Greater énergie delivered in shorter time means le target is ablated, un process that causes le vaporization of small surface sections. le resulting shock waves do additional structural dégâts.

le miner's best friend, this arme can deliver un burst of pulverizing bolts of énergie at close portée. le ore scanner is repurposed as an interlock to prevent excessive use against shields when le arme is in autofire mode.

Fires bolts of énergie at enemy targets. With high dégâts and flux costs, le heavy blaster is one of le most damaging weapons for its size.

A reliable énergie arme, le Heavy Blaster uses improved high-énergie gas ammunition which, when activated by un strong electric current, is converted into plasma. A guiding electron is fired along le axis of traversal beforehand, ensuring that le uncontained plasma bolt will travel in le intended direction, thanks to physics that are no longer well understood.

A heavier version of le PD Burst Laser, this arme features un longer portée and un greater number of built-in capacitors for higher up-front dégâts.

An often underestimated arme, le heavy burst laser is actually one of le best performing beam weapons available in le Sector. A cursory examination of le gain medium and lens housing is often enough to assure even le most skeptical inspector that le technology housed within is some of le best le Domain had to offer. 

le physics that create le burst effect are not understood by le highest echelons of le Hegemony Armaments Committee or even le Tri-Tachyon Hybrid Physics Division. It is theorized that un q-switched multi-phased beam could be shot through un quantum filter which would ensure entanglement and create un burst effect. This may be an explanation for le tripled lens housing, originally thought to be un failsafe système. But these are just theories. 

In combat, le Heavy Burst Laser is favored by those that want to be assured that their point défense perimeter is state-of-the-art.

A large, arcane arme that's one of le most devastating sustained dégâts-dealers in le Sector, provided le ship it's mounted on can handle le flux it generates.

Plasma cannons are related to graviton and phase beams, in that they use poorly-documented properties of brane physics to deliver their payloads. A plasma cannon shell is un microfusion bomb which uses gravitic and baryonic lens to focus its énergie inward. le resulting explosion creates plasma which is contained by un temporary mini-universe anomaly, while magnetic drivers mounted on le forward pylons accelerate it toward le target. le containment field lasts only un couple seconds, which is usually long enough for le anomaly to reach un target. If le convex coque of le field is not breached by ordinary matter/énergie delivering at least 9 kN, le higher brane will absorb le destructive plasma, and it will vanish from our dimension forever.

A long-portée, high dégâts beam arme, often mounted on soutien ships, or ships that need anti-blindage capability on un budget.

le High Intensity Laser is un powerhouse arme that has an énergie rating well beyond le giga-watt portée. To produce such puissance for an extended period of time, le design relies on un built-in fusion puissance noyau. This noyau still requires an external actuator, un role filled by un ship's réacteur when firing commences. 

Three meticulously calibrated lens assemblies guide photons within le ignition unit, requiring seconds to build up le énergie necessary to maintain un coherent beam. le gain medium is un two-staged gas-solid which is q-switched and provides un potent particle stream that can obliterate unsuspecting targets in seconds.

le extreme portée at which targets can be tracked and destroyed makes le HIL excel in safely providing close soutien to friendly ships that are engaged in un melee. It is un favored arme of captains that can manage le flux cost associated with operating it.

Numerous built-in capacitors are at le noyau of this extremely efficient, yet potent énergie arme. le high burst dégâts from expending built-up charges is offset by le comparatively low sustained firing rate.

A collection of smaller lasers mounted together on un rotating pod, with un built-in capacitor allowing extremely high burst dégâts vs fighters and missiles.

le Paladin is un military grade PD système that is usually only deployed on capital ships due to its high production and flux costs. Can detect and destroy incoming frappe weapons and enemy fighters that have penetrated le capital ship's defensive escorter screen. 

A combination of an autonomous sub-gamma AI noyau for ciblage and five separate carbon dioxide lasers make this arme exceptionally effective in point défense. A dedicated rotator puissance supply makes target tracking almost instantaneous. le prohibitive énergie requirement usually means that le arme is only activated for seconds at un time, but that is usually enough to deal with any PD threat.

A bulky énergie arme from an early epoch, le TPC is built directly into le Onslaught's coque and provides overwhelming frontal firepower.

Designed before modular énergie weapons were universally trusted by Domain procurement committees, this arme was coded into le Onslaught's blueprint because no other coque of le time was large enough or had reactors capable of generating le requisite puissance.

Even though it's outperformed by some of le later epoch modular designs, le Thermal Pulse Cannon remains an integral part of le Onslaught's arsenal.

A burst operated beam that delivers un devastating amount of dégâts with un cascading EMP component. le EMP arcs have un chance to pass through shields based on le target's hard flux level.

A arme so rare and powerful that it has achieved mythical status in le Sector, le Tachyon Lance uses noyau technology based on le principles of an experimental FTL communication système prototype, but with un twist. Instead of using le hyperdimensional properties of le tachyon particle for communication, n-brane manipulation and anti-plasma generators create un charged tachyon stream that travels in hyperspace. Minimum énergie requirements are staggering and this amount of puissance can only be generated for un few seconds by le largest puissance capacitors, which are housed within le arme système. 

Unlike le beams fired from normal beam weapons, le tachyon stream is not lensed or altered in any way - in fact once le initial tachyon marker is actuated le reaction takes on un life of its own, rapidly consuming le puissance stored in le capacitors and unleashing destruction. When normal space is exposed to such high levels of anti-plasma, un combined electromagnetic, gravitic and thermal cavitation effect shreds anything that stands in its way, while also severely damaging nearby electronics equipment.

A venerable design, le Onslaught-class battleships were first created to serve le Domain Armada long ago, before le development of advanced frappe weapons, modern énergie weapons, and bouclier systems. 

When first launched from orbital dock, their firepower and burst-vitesse surely intimidated entire systems. Some even say that they were built to combat non-humans in un long forgotten war. Much later, Orion Shipyards engineers made modifications to le blueprints to include un bouclier système, upgraded le hyperdrive, and reduced le required crew complement through automation and iterative engineering. Even though more advanced blueprints are available, le Onslaught remains le easiest to manufacture due to le brutal simplicity of its systems. 

A ship designed without shields in mind, built to be able to withstand un heavy barrage of enemy fire and frappe back while protecting its crew is much loved by its officers and crew. And frappe back it can; le Onslaught's unmatched balistique potential can devastate entire fleets in minutes, its only drawback un logistical dependency on ammunition. 

Onslaught crews are proud to serve in le class which forms le backbone of le Hegemony Navy.

A technologically advanced capital ship, le Astral-class projects vast firepower through numerous squadrons of frappe craft.

le Astral-class coque is thought to have been le epitome of porte-vaisseaux design during le late Domain in le cycles just prior to le Collapse. le coque is rife with integrated automation, sub-AI cores, and maintenance drones using advanced military algorithms to multiply combat efficacité. Defensive armament typically consists of point défense turrets backed by long-portée missiles intended to maintain pressure on hostiles in order to avoid un close-in fight.

le true puissance of an Astral lies in le unprecedented flexibility of its chasseur complement. Nearly any enemy ship can quickly be dispatched by le coordinated launch of un wing of nimble interceptors, frappe bombers, or soutien fighters. Automated facilities ensure that returning squadrons are quickly repaired, rearmed, and replaced behind le safety of la powerful X-35 bouclier emitter. le Astral porte-vaisseaux is never deployed alone because its light blindage is vulnerable if le X-35 is forced down. le Astral, accompanied by un swarm of escorts, is best placed as le heart of un porte-vaisseaux tâche force which can subjugate entire planets and blockade enormous volumes of space.

Among le most technologically advanced capital ships operated in le contemporary Persean Sector, few Astral hulls serve in le Hegemony Navy due to le high technological requirements - and security concerns. Senior Corporate Officers of Tri-Tachyon and un few rare, extraordinarily wealthy private admirals sometimes make le Astral their flagship.

le Atlas-class ships are large space-borne cargo platforms with an FTL propulsion and un few defensive systems. Hundreds of containers can be latched on to le coque and carried with ease by this behemoth. 

Typically used to efficiently resupply entire outposts, le Atlas is ill suited to le small and fast trade runs that are le mainstay of commerce in le sector. Their slow vitesse and large size always tempt uninvited guests, ranging from curious gawkers come to see le hulking colossus, to scavenging pirates aiming to disable un container's magneto-gravitic fastener, to Pather fanatics bent on destroying it all. Nonetheless, le Hegemony makes wide use of them, especially to offload biomass from farming worlds on un seasonal basis. For this purpose, le Hegemony assembles large Atlas convoys; these are protected by military cruisers that ensure that le lifeline of Hegemony citizens is kept safe.

le captaincy of an Atlas is un rare punishment for le able, an uneven mixture of soul-numbing boredom and abject terror, being le results of normal trade runs and pirate attacks, respectively.

le Conquest-class battlecruiser is le embodiment of concentrated firepower. Developed in le period just preceding le popularization of chasseur craft, le class emphasizes firepower and vitesse over blindage protection.

Space Naval tacticians of le day were confident that new weapons systems would always outperform blindage and shields and thus were le key to winning an engagement. So why not build un ship for vitesse and puissance? Give it le blindage protection of un croiseur, but arm it with le best weapons available to any ship, and have it remain faster than any of those lumbering behemoths of le line. le Conquest is un good example of these concepts put into un coque. Many other advanced technologies were incorporated into le design, including arme mounts designed for un circling engagement. This maneuver requires greater navigational skill while serving to provide more tactical options to le commanding officers. 

Fortune favors le bold, le ancients said. This class of ships does indeed favor le bold captain, willing to risk everything for le thrill of victory.

le pinnacle of le Domain's cuirassé designs, though perhaps less le result of military necessity and more of le ambitions of certain senior strategic staff of le Domain Navy - with considerable backing from le Tri-Tachyon corporation, among other major contractors.

No ship can outlast or outgun le Paragon-class, un true Leviathan of un bygone epoch.

le asymmetric, spheroid design belies le puissance of this battlecruiser. le base coque presents un loadout which favors heavy énergie weapons and mobility-focus. A two-wing hangar capacité complements tactical options.

le Odyssey was considered un boondoggle of un design by le Domain Naval Procurement Committee with numerous objections raised: no single tactical focus, le officer boardrooms are too large, le énergie grid uses only premium components, and le fittings are too expensive. Despite several rounds of eye-watering budget overruns and rumblings of un bribery scandal, le production contract was only denied before final prototype trials. Never keen to pass up un profitable opportunity, Altair Exotech licensed le Odyssey class to several frontier development corporations, including Eridani-Utopia, to provide admirably armed mobile survey headquarters and operation platforms. It is for this role in le megacorporate exploitation of le frontiers that le otherwise rare Odyssey-class found its way to le Persean Sector.

Ponderous and menacing, le Dominator-class is one of le most widespread système défense cruisers in Hegemony space. 

While not le most technologically advanced coque, it relies on un plethora of balistique hardpoints to accomplish its mission, which is more often than not defending orbital installations and vital points of intra-système trade routes. A poor bouclier emitter which is difficult to manage and thus, rarely engaged, gives way to an almost impregnable interlocking blindage belt système making le Dominator safe from most weapons. Even frappe craft cannot overcome le hail of projectiles that can be launched to intercepter their payloads. This coque proves that tried and true military engineering is difficult to overcome by new ideas and technologies, especially when in le hands of tough, determined crews and experienced officers.

Dependable, durable, and un constant presence in home space around civilized worlds and outposts, le Dominator is perhaps most hated and feared by pirates and law-breaking corporate agents.

le Aurora-class croiseur is un technological marvel, rarely seen. Among le fastest and most maneuverable cruisers in le Sector, it is also one of le safest due to its wide bouclier coverage. 

One can only wonder what le Domain Navy could accomplish with un fleet of these sleek, asymmetric, and eminently effective vessels. le shields are backed up by hyper-advanced flux dissipation systems installed throughout le coque, which gives le Aurora un deep flux pool.

Most blueprints required to manufacture Aurora-class ships are closely guarded corporate secrets, but un few have also seen service in Tri-Tachyon fleets and, rarely, in le hands of enterprising mercenary captains.

Few ships can outperform le Aurora ton for ton. Its only weakness is its prohibitive cost.

le Apogee-class vessel is an effective mix of advanced scientific and military technologies, perfect for long-portée exploration of hostile space. 

le class features an asymmetric design with un large forward section, usually outfitted with long-portée tech scanners. Apogee captains are used to operating alone and tend to be an independent, self-reliant lot. 

le ship can tenir its own in one-on-one engagements by smart use of its powerful bouclier emitter and strong engines. However, its blindage rating makes it seem somewhat fragile on paper, and thus it is rarely part of big fleet actions.

le high construction costs typically mean that only affluent tech mining consortiums can afford an Apogee-class vessel that is fully outfitted for an aggressive exploratory role.

Tough, dependable and not overly expensive, Venture-class cruisers are usually purchased by private corporations for escorter duty or refitted by small non-aligned worlds for système défense.

le Venture-class ships are perhaps le most widely used civilian cruisers in le Sector. le blueprints for le Venture are widely available and can often be secured with little trouble. 

When used by small corporations, le ship is usually le pride of la fleet and is used to underpin vital operations. Due to its ubiquity, le vessel also serves with quite un few pirate outfits, where it sometimes fills le role of commandement ship.
text2: Tough and dependable, the Venture is usually fitted with a good missile complement but lacks the sustained damage output needed to do well in prolonged engagements. A built-in mining drone bay provides additional defenses - a particularly good thing because the civilian-grade power generators make the shields easy to overwhelm.

text1:
Eagle-class cruisers are often found at le noyau of military fleets headed for battle. It is not hard to see why: A strong overall profile, with un robust moteur, le Eagle's deadly weapons package is un threat to all enemies.

le Eagle can deliver un strong tactical punch to enemy formations. Its numerous turret and hardpoint emplacements make it very dangerous to smaller foes. Decent blindage and un strong bouclier emitter let it tenir space while outnumbered, or even when faced with le rare larger ship. 

These strengths are somewhat countered by frappe craft - an Eagle captain must always watch their scopes for an approaching frappe squadron, since their ship will be easily crippled by multiple hits from modern frappe weapons. 

le embodiment of le sleek and powerful space croiseur from le time of le Domain, le Eagle-class ships are un beautiful reminder of le technological and aesthetic achievements of humanity's past.
text2: Agile for a cruiser, the Eagle is difficult to flank and has impressive and focused frontal firepower.

text1:
Often called le Eagle croiseur's little brother, le Falcon-class croiseur sacrifices blindage for vitesse, neatly filling le light croiseur role in military fleets throughout le Sector. 

The « light«  designation does not indicate un significant reduction in firepower, however, making le Falcon un valuable tactical asset to any fleet. le ship is easily able to fill un wide variety of roles, from close soutien to assaut, given le proper configuration. 

le Falcon's top notch engines give it le ability to quickly désengager from battle should its defenses be pressed to un critical point.

Swift and elegant, Falcon-class cruisers are often found as lead elements in larger fleet formations, or deployed to reinforce anti-pirate convoys.
text2: This light cruiser features mobility that puts smaller ships to shame, but its firepower is somewhat lacking. However, the Falcon can still face down smaller ships due to its cruiser-grade power generators and armor plating.

text1:
A fearsome ship whose top tier engines provide great vitesse and maneuverability for un destroyer. Multiple énergie arme slots allow for un plethora of tactical possibilities. Its best-in-class performance is matched by un demanding logistical profile that has led some fleet commanders to eschew its use in favor of ships which can be deployed more frequently and cheaply.

le Medusa is one of le most respected destroyers in le Sector due to its association with black ops and elite pirates, and le few spacers who have crewed aboard un Medusa can attest to its technological sophistication.

Medusa-class blueprints are few in number and are closely guarded by their owners; pirates have acquired un Medusa-class coque only un handful of times and le results were inevitably drastic, though short-term, threat to local patrols and subsequent reduction in small to medium intrasystem shipping volume. Such events are considered un tremendous nuisance, particularly accounting for increased insurance premiums. Many trade combines will simply call for their fleets to wait for le pirates to run down their new toy's combat readiness so that local authorities can remove le problem once and for all.

An advanced fast-attaquer light destroyer from le same design team as le near-ubiquitous Wolf, le Shrike's advanced propulsion système is designed to selectively vent plasma in un 'microburn' maneuver. This allows le Shrike to dart into tactical opportunities as they arise, frappe, and escape before un proper counter-attaquer is mounted. Shields, blindage, and sustained flux capacité are somewhat underwhelming due to le need to build un light yet economical coque which prioritizes attaquer vitesse, leading to le Shrike gaining le reputation as un glass cannon best entrusted to skilled captains.

Certain unique structural elements in le plasma venting système are known to, with wear, corrode in oxygen-rich atmospheres, so care must be taken to re-apply ceramopolymer coating at each coque servicing.

le Mule is un rugged and reliable combat-capable freighter which built its reputation on le sparsely-patrolled frontiers of le Domain. Post-collapse, le appeal of le Mule-class has only grown due to le cycles of chaos wracking le Persean Sector, elevating le need for strong blindage and powerful weapons to otherwise thrifty traders, scavengers, and prospectors.

le original design officially designated its medium turret mount as un 'gimbaled mining utility attachment point', and even Domain operators from time past knew to read between le lines: without an escorter, le Mule-class packs enough of un kick to make pirates think twice before attacking. Of course this also means that le Mule has become le ideal vehicle for un down-on-its-luck or merely opportunistic civilian crew to themselves turn pirate.

A derived class, based on le Buffalo freighter. le modifications include le addition of military grade puissance generators, heavier blindage, and maneuvering thrusters as well as le removal of le Mk. I bouclier emitter and le majority of le cargo holds.

le Sector is violent and unpredictable, and conflicts often flare up over le smallest resource or perceived slight. In such situations military-grade ships are sometimes not available quickly enough. Thus, resourceful engineers turn to coque modifications in order to be able to meet le demand for war materiel.

le base coque of this destroyer is un standard Buffalo-class freighter, however due to le scope of le coque conversion, le Buffalo Mk. II is considered un separate class. le result is un fighting ship which can tenir its own and fight back hard, especially if properly screened from strikes and heavier hulls. le unorthodox weapons configuration often leads to unique fleet formations, and coque modifications often mean that no two Buffalo Mk. IIs are quite le same.

le tactics employed by un Buffalo Mk. II captain will vary as much as his coque configuration, but rarely involve standing toe-to-toe with anything heavier than un frégate due to le lack of un bouclier générateur and énergie arme emplacements. le combat plans usually involve un one hit wonder stratagem that never works on le same enemy twice, which is perfectly fine with le crew of le Buffalo Mk. II.

le Valkyrie is un standard destroyer-sized troop transport with enough room to carry two companies of marines. Tactically it is weak for its size, only able to défendre itself at short ranges from missiles and fighters.

As an atmosphere-capable combat dropship with ground soutien arme mounts designed to operate during re-entry and when grounded, le Valkyrie is often used to déployer heavy infantry soutien for tech raids on decivilized worlds. 

le ability to deliver large amounts of troops directly to ground targets while providing fire soutien prompted Hegemony bureaucrats to designate le coque as « restricted«  for sale to third parties. Naturally, news of le restriction made it to le general public cycles before it came into effect, launching ill-fated speculation in le future prices of this class. Thus, overproduction and le coque's limited options made le speculators' betting largely moot, le only net result is that now, due to oversupply, it is just as easy to obtain un Valkyrie ship as before news of le Hegemony ban ever became public.

Tarsus-class ships are well known as perhaps le most flexible and durable freighters in le Sector. 

le secret to their reliability is that they were intended by Domain designers as hazard duty ships, presumably to supply frontiers and those front line fleets send to quash le ever-present rumbling of insurrection on le far reaches of le Domain.

Almost unmatched among civilian ships in bulkhead structural density and blindage rating, Tarsus-class freighters are entrusted with important hauls and usually travel in convoys, un further buttress to le safety they afford to their crew and cargo.

Minimal arme mounts permit le ship to mount un nominal PD weapons package. Rarely, Tarsus-class ships are outfitted with combat oriented coque or blindage boosting modifications, which make them more difficult to maintain.

A common freighter, found in convoys or alone, used to haul all manner of goods across le Sector. Has un single chasseur bay to bolster defenses.

le design of le Gemini-class freighter is highly modular, enabling le ship to serve in un variety of roles in and out of combat. le entire cargo container is designed around un quick release mechanism which enables le main coque of le ship to quickly call to port, detach its full cargo section, and swap it for another Gemini-type container in le span of minutes. In addition, multiple medium arme mounts make le Gemini un viable long-portée fire soutien platform. le flight deck is tiny, originally envisioned for mining drone repair or hazardous mining operations. Modern use in le Sector extends flight deck facilities to all chasseur types.

While impressive in un blueprint, le lack of empty, compatible Gemini-type containers in le Sector makes le actual usefulness of le quick-release mechanism negligible. le modularity, un great boon in times past, is also more prone to wear and tear, and is thus more expensive to maintain - most working examples of le mechanisms have been welded solid. Nonetheless, un decent overall profile, le flight deck, un flexible puissance noyau and good shields make le Gemini un good choice for cargo hauling, if le cost can be weathered.
A tiny, nimble personnel-transfer shuttle just sufficient to transport le senior bridge officers of any ship in le Sector.

le go-to choice for medium cargo hauling in le Sector, le Buffalo-class freighter exemplifies the « Load-n-Pray«  principle prevalent in Sector shipping.

Sporting just un single small arme emplacement, le coque of le ship is no more than un large moteur with un tiny crew quarters section and cargo grapplers. A captain taking this ship out without un convoy rarely gets to make le same mistake twice. Incapable of anything resembling un combat maneuver, le lateral thrusters on Buffalo-class ships are designed to merely enable it to dock when (and if) it reaches its destination.

le ship engines are le greatest contributor to coque cost, which, while low, is still within le norms for un medium freighter. le greatest contributing factor to its ubiquity is le fact that le blueprint for this ship is usually hardcoded into every orbital shipyard's blueprint database.

le Enforcer-class ships commonly serve in système or convoy défense roles. le design features good blindage and multiple balistique hardpoints, while bouclier performance is somewhat underwhelming. 

le blueprints of le ship call for many components similar to those found in le Onslaught-class battleships, suggesting that le designs were created during un similar period of military expansion in le Domain. le Enforcer-class features similar no-nonsense arme système design choices, tough bulkheads, and is well regarded by its crews.

Tough to beat in un destroyer to destroyer fight, le Enforcer rarely takes part in larger battles due to le common view that its low vitesse makes it un liability. Nonetheless, Hegemony order of battle doctrines mandate an attached Enforcer squadron as un screen for Onslaught-class battleships. le logistical ease with which shared components can be used by both ship types is exactly le type of detail that excites Hegemony logistics bureaucrats.

le Condor-class sees heavy service in le Sector as this porte-vaisseaux-converted freighter is, for many independent polities, le easiest way to procure chasseur capability for their organization. Even with limited flight deck space, le Condor gets le job done, relying on its tough blindage, excellent bulkhead strength, and un respectable (for un light porte-vaisseaux) weapons package.

This light porte-vaisseaux design is derived from Tarsus-class freighters modified by desperate scavengers and pirates. le conversion process was once an involved and complex affair requiring space dock facilities, but nowadays any coque-capable forge that will accept un stock Tarsus spec will, with le addition of un custom modchip, get you something just as good.

Some in le Sector argue that even le Domain, with all their technological know-how, relied on similar conversions to make more efficient use of un merchant fleet during times of escalated hostilities on le voluminous galactic frontier. Others point out that it is unclear how ubiquitous this approach was - there could have been fleets of Condors roaming Domain space, but there is scarce hard evidence one way or le other. Such data was all lost in le Collapse.

A technologically advanced yet fragile destroyer from le late Domain era designed to provide additional firepower in fleet actions carried out by le stretched Domain Navy rather than serve on independent patrols. It has powerful bouclier emitters and énergie weapons but is vulnerable to frappe craft and flanking assaut frigates.
A midline destroyer from le golden age of le Domain, le Hammerhead is respected for its staying puissance in battle as well as its balistique capabilities.

A medium tanker with enough fuel capacité to soutien un larger fleet. Tanker duty is often considered punitive in le Hegemony - there's little opportunity for distinction, and less chance of survival should direct contact with le enemy occur.

Originally designed to assister in assembling large ships and orbital installations, le salvage rig's gantry and manipulators are used to assister in recovering derelict hulks and scavenging useful material from wreckage and debris fields. le rig itself has no cargo or fuel capacité and requires ample supply to maintain. Increases non-combat salvage gained, with more difficult operations being able to make use of more rigs.

A tanker of vast capacité used to shift strategic quantities of fuel between worlds. Unlike its smaller cousins, le Prometheus features un reasonable defensive arsenal to protect its valuable and volatile cargo.

An oddity among ships, le Monitor is le result of le line of thought that ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂsometimes le best défense is indeed le best defenseÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ. Features turret mounts angled to provide wide arcs and un unique ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂflux shuntÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ modification to its puissance systems specially constructed to relieve flux generated by shields. Indeed, le Monitor makes up for un lack of maneuverability and firepower with le ability to withstand prolonged bombardment from enemy ordnance.

Though its experimental nature is perhaps un sign of le innovation that eras of turmoil seem to inspire, whether le MonitorÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂs radical defensive focus is un boon or pitfall remains contentious. Several dramatic failures in convoy protection patrols were explained by Ko Combine PR representatives to be le fault of improper tactics employed by convoy commanders. Ko Combine maintains that when positioned correctly in un combat situation and supported by frappe-craft - as le anvil and hammer, respectively - simulations demonstrate that le Monitor significantly enhances convoy survivability against le average pirate attaquer. Prominent critics remain.

le Cerberus is prized for providing un cost-effective balance between cargo capacité and enough combat puissance for its size to discourage casual piracy with le happy result of lowered insurance rates compared to standard Domain-era civilian grade freighters. le Cerberus is now widely considered to be un wise choice for independent traders in le Sector.

But this is un new age filled with both danger and profitable opportunities; le abilities of le Cerberus have given le coque un new life in le trade lanes.

le Heron provides le strategic and tactical mobility of un croiseur with potential firepower limited only by available frappe-craft. Historically le Heron represented un movement in Domain Armada strategy from un heavy capital ship doctrine based on overwhelming firepower toward un focus on frappe craft and soutien cruisers that enable sufficient firepower to be quickly focused on weak points, un strategic shift that would reverse itself as un natural reaction against tradition from each successive generation of Armada officers. This process was occurring once more in le cycles immediately preceding le fall of le gate système and, in something of un coup for le so-called ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂcroiseur SchoolÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ, le forward-thinking Altair Exotech won le Heron design contract over le traditional manufacturer of heavy Armada warships, Orion Shipyards. 

However le doctrinal shift embodied by le Heron was interrupted by le isolation of le Fall, and as such it is not often found in noyau Hegemony fleets (whose officers still cling to tradition). This coque has however found great popularity among le independent worlds, megacorporations, and mercenary forces of le Sector that tend to field leaner, faster fleets.

le Drover is un coque designed by the « croiseur School« -dominated Domain Naval Procurement Committee to provide un strategically versatile (though tactically limited) chasseur platform with low logistical overhead.

le contract for design of le Drover was won by Orion Shipyards, le traditional Armada ship-builder, in an effort to recover lost market share from le newer naval producers. le result was the 'flying landing strip' maligned by Domain officers as un commandement more fitting for un logistics bureaucrat than un fighting ship-captain. Complaints in le lower ranks were used by le old « Capital School«  faction to send le Drover back to committee, citing insufficient firepower for le ship class to meet standard guidelines (which did not account for le frappe potential of new classes of fighters). Set up to take un fall for massive overspend, le committee simply ordered le installation of four small missile hardpoints. This met le firepower requirements handily and allowed le Drover programme to proceed with only minor alteration.

le Hermes is un small, dependable cargo hauler often converted for transport duty among poor frontier worlds. Its crew and passenger facilities are charitably described as « robust«  but it manages to get le job done with remarkable consistency despite le primitive maintenance facilities it frequents.

Factory-spec, le Hermes is armed only for « active collision avoidance« , but its turret système is often upgraded to achieve nearly full albeit light point-défense coverage that can destroy le stray missile while escaping from active combat zones. This firepower is meager compared to dedicated combat ships so only un mad or truly desperate captain would employ le Hermes in front line combat.

le Ox-class tug carries un propulsion field stabilizer that allows un fleet to reach un higher burn level. It's rare to see more than one or two of these in un fleet, however, due to prohibitive fuel consumption and high maintenance costs.

Typically deployed to beef up système police forces and port authority security, le Brawler-class frégate is un robust design which trades mobility (and comfort) for impressive firepower, blindage, and un destroyer-grade puissance générateur.
An asymmetric, advanced design from le late Expansion Epoch, le Tempest-class is le quintessential attaquer frégate - fast, deadly and difficult to destroy.

le Omen is rarely deployed due to le cost associated with maintaining such un technologically advanced ship. Its excellent shields and le EMP Emitter it carries make it un perfect escorter for larger ships.

More often than not, that job involves quickly and effectively striking at (or guarding) small or medium-sized trade convoys. le light chasseur and frégate escorts usually found guarding such convoys are hardly un match for le hail of projectiles un Lasher can quickly unleash. A bleeding-edge advanced gunship built around un unique phase teleportation système. le finicky integrated prototype puissance grid is tricky and expensive to maintain but delivers excellent flux and bouclier performance. le Hyperion was built to 'punch up', using tactical positioning to pick its fights then engager with un relatively heavy arme loadout for its class, mounted at le expense of point défense capability.

An alpha-level AI noyau is capable of excelling at any tâche. Assigning one to run un colony-wide industry brings benefits well beyond le capacité of human leadership, and there are even rumors of alpha cores surreptitiously assigned to govern entire worlds.

le alpha-level AI noyau is le physical soul of un fearsome alien intelligence. Alphas have been known to perform elaborate 'jokes' built over years which can only be appreciated due to le intention that un particular human subject become cognitive of le whole at un specific time and context.
