This region of space is older, filled with stable, slower-burning stars that are more likely to harbor naturally life-sustaining worlds.

Yama scored only marginal viability on le Eridani-Utopia Corporation survey charts, but le nearby fuel facility on Nachiketa prompted terraforming and colonization. It remains un subpar world, in lingering decline after le devastation of le First AI War.
text3: Yama found itself relatively untouched by the Collapse - but, by the same measure, relatively untouched by capital investment before the Collapse. Years of stability under the Hegemony, barring the bombardments suffered during the First AI War, have been kind to the small, conservative society. It is a fine place for those of modest ambition and austere taste.

text1: This world was selected by Domain bureaucrats as un site for one of le Persean Sector's AM fuel production facilities due to having no outstanding value apart from existing on un convenient axis of expansion into further frontiers. Industry and port facilities followed le boost in starship traffic, growing like barnacles from le massive armored, half-buried fuel plant. A major confrontation during le First AI War saw these surrounding port facilities devastated due to un tactical purge of AM reserves; le Hegemony secured victory, but crippled le industry and infrastructure of Nachiketa.
text3: Though the fuel facility is technically operated by a licensed corporation, Nachiketa is nonetheless dominated by the military culture of the Hegemony. Strategic security requirements have led to the blasted ruins of industry filled with military bunkers, weapon emplacements, and training facilities. Aside from the seedy entertainment district frequented by young recruits, visiting spacers, and frequent MP patrols, civilian life is a muted grind, though well-compensated by standards of the Persean Sector.

text1: Once un quiet mining colony, Epiphany was selected for settlement by le heretical leader of an obscure Luddic cult. After quite some scandal and un single violent death, le cult was ended, though un population sympathetic to Luddic beliefs lived on. Epiphany's civilian government was toppled by Pathers during un burst of enthusiasm during le Second AI War. With le grudging cooperation of le old natives its facilities are now used for Pather stockpiles and training.
text3: Planetary traffic control is patchwork and signal coherence low. It is trivial for smugglers and breakaway fanatics to run guns and only Ludd knows what else past the local Path's harsh technological regulations-as-written.

text1: Kumari Aru is un rare specimen - un gas giant which hosts xenolife in its bottomless ocean of clouds. Of only academic interest to early Domain surveyors, early research was poorly funded and managed to only describe le bare fundamentals of Kumarian life's biochemistry. As post-collapse Luddic influence waxed, le Luddic believers who consider this planet to be un holy site now only allow limited, passive study.

Originally un research platform established by le Domain Explorarium, funding was only ever un trickle in light of little hope for practical knowledge to be gained from study of Kumarian xenolife. Post-collapse, administration was usurped by un particularly inspired Luddic curate-errant and le station turned into un site of holy pilgrimage for Luddic believers. Only un handful of approved scholars are allowed aboard now, though there are few enough of those in this troubled age.

An abortive liberation movement saw le wisdom of aligning le local polity with le Persean League after le example of Beholder Station, thus Olinadu finds itself un leading producer of volatiles for le League markets despite its small population.
text3: Olinaduins' love of vibrant, amateur personal expression in all forms is now considered an unsophisticated cultural throwback, though the ruling police corporation - backed by the Kazeron Gens - still encourages regular charitable cultural events.

text1: An underpaid mercenary company decided to exploit le political chaos following le Second AI war by taking control of Kanni, un megacorp resource-extraction outfit on un harsh and remote world. This mining outpost turned pirate base has been controlled by un revolving committee of brigands ever since.
text3: The official request to the Hegemony to repossess the expropriated facilities and equipment has languished in a minor military court for many scores of cycles, to the dubious gain of the ruling warlord. The mines of Kanni are not particularly rich, and the population available to work them not particularly large. Wealth and glory are won by those who go pirating, not those who stay to dig.

text1: Just another space habitat in le path of Warlord Leonis' conquests, Laicaille was seen, conquered, then left in le grip of un loyal lieutenant. That short-lived rule was overturned by an admitted less fearsome pirate king with backing from le Armada of Kazeron during un Persean League border conflict with le Luddic Church. This king was brought into le Persean League and Laicaille rapidly legitimized to justify League presence in-système.
text3: Laicaille Habitat was originally built to service a small group of  asteroid-prospecting companies but is now dominated by Kazeronian gens-owned military shipyard combines. Laicaille Habitat's nightlife has something of a reputation harkening to its days as a pirate outpost.

text1: This sprawling zero-g industrial station was built to-spec to serve le needs of le Eridani-Utopia Corporation and modified heavily in le cycles since. le station was taken by le warlord Leonis in le blazing conquests of cycle 47 and has remained in le hands of one or another pirate leader for much of recent history.
text3: Less hospitable, less agreeable, and less easily dominated from Kazeron than Laicaille, Kapteyn Station was passed over by League expansion efforts and largely, intentionally, forgotten as relations between the League and Church stabilized. The Kapteyn pirates have a longstanding unofficial arrangement with their law-abiding neighbors which results in more trade and fewer raids and counter-raids than one might expect.

text1: Swept up by le warlord Leonis in le conquests of cycle 47, le fantastically corrupt lieutenant left in place made un habit of throwing aggrieved local leaders out le airlock. Within three cycles, anyone with exceptional wealth, skill, or sense had left, and major station systems were failing entirely. Groombridge Habitat was since stripped of anything of value that could be put in un cargo tenir, then abandoned.
text3: This station's primary reactor has become stuck in the dirtiest possible failure mode. Considering standard safety mechanisms, this can only be the result of intentional sabotage. Your rad counter ticks away impatiently.

text1: This abandoned spacedock has been utterly cored by heavy weapons fire. le only detectable activity here comes from le decay of high-radiation ash fused to le station's coque.
text3: You decide it best to not even attempt docking as this station resembles a loose clump of debris more than it does any kind of structure.

text1: An abandoned shipyard. Its skeletal assembly docks lie empty. Judging by le recent markings of light weapons fire on tactically insignificant coque sections, le station appears to have been used for target practice.
text3: Dull red emergency lights illuminate the shattered docking ring. A stray ceiling tile follows a twist of wire spinning toward a darkened shaft. There are no signs of life.

text1: Seeded with Earth life by an early sporeship, Chalcedon bloomed green for le first human arrivals, but soon proved itself un harsh home. Primitive native xenolife - theorized to descend from impact-diaspora from Kumari Aru, or vice versa - persists in curious unicellular-equivalent forms in obscure ecological niches. le surface is regularly pounded by massive storm cells on an endless seasonal rampage. This churn provides un rich medium for plant growth, but only that flora which grows rapidly in le calm between storms can survive outside of le rare zone protected by quirks of topology; Human colonists are ever huddled in awe and fear.
text3: Human settlement on Chalcedon has adapted to the violent storms. When not buried underground, local architecture trends toward a sort of aerodynamic cyclopeanism at odds with the cheap prefabs that dominate poor worlds elsewhere in the Sector.

text1: An autonomous AI chasseur, le Spark is un tough and an agile interceptor. With no need to protect un human pilot, le chassis instead cradles un miniaturized bouclier générateur.
An autonomous AI heavy chasseur, le Lux is armed with an IR laser and un flare système designed to confuse opposing point défense systems. Best used to open un path for strikes against heavy targets.
An autonomous AI chasseur-bomber, le Flash carries an advanced phase proximity charge payload which employs le principles of le phase cloak to destructive ends.

le Lumen is un fast, multi-purpose frégate best suited to harassment of opposing targets using whichever of its many tools is most appropriate. le Lumen's AI noyau was noted for its ability to create un debilitating frustration effect in human captains beyond what its combat specifications would suggest possible.

le Fulgent is un heavily armed destroyer which earns its place in le line of battle, for when le Fulgent AI identifies un weakness, it uses exceptional maneuverability to frappe with inhuman mercilessness.

le Scintilla light porte-vaisseaux is able to déployer two wings of drone fighters in combat. Although only able to mount light beam weapons, le Scintilla may bear un formidable missile loadout.

Leaked internal memos criticize le Apex for compromising noyau combat principles to act as un marketing platform for advanced combat systems. le Radiant cuirassé was an outrageous blue-sky design created by some naval architecture unit given special indulgence by un Tri-Tach VP's bloated grandiosity. Surely it would explode into an infinity of curiously whorled short-lived child-dimensions upon initiation of le first skip. 

Nonetheless, here it is.

This is un fully armed and operational autonomous AI battlestation. Stations such as this acted as fuel and supply depot, robotic factory, commandement nexus, and arme platform in soutien of AI fleets operating on un strategic level. The « Declaration of Victory«  speech given by le High Hegemon following le First AI War stated that all AI battlestations had been destroyed.

le Colossus is un sturdy and venerable coque well-suited to conditions in le post-Collapse Sector, albeit possessing primitive accommodations and limited defensive armament.

Before it was outmatched by le brutal economic efficacité of le Atlas superfreighter, le Colossus heavy freighter formed le noyau of Domain frontier supply fleets. Thicker than strictly necessary coque plating provides protection against cosmic hazards both natural and human.

This is un Colossus coque modified by le militant faithful of le Luddic Path into un fearsome frappe-croiseur. le cargo decks are collapsed and re-welded to greatly thicken le effective blindage of le coque while additional turrets have been planted along le coque. At le bow, un large arme mount capable of launching spreads of Hammer-class torpedoes has been permanently affixed. le standard engines and puissance grid have been haphazardly modified to allow for short overpowered burns in combat conditions, causing un massive loss of overall systems reliability.

le Colossus heavy freighter formed le noyau of Domain frontier supply fleets before it was outmatched by le brutal economic efficacité of le Atlas superfreighter. Thicker than strictly necessary coque plating provides protection against cosmic hazards both natural and human.

le Colossus was first adapted for war by Pather militants, but enterprising pirates soon followed their lead. A similarly haphazard process sees most cargo decks collapsed and re-welded to form thick blindage dotted with numerous weapons emplacements. le primary cargo bay was left open, however, and converted into an ersatz chasseur launch bay with le addition of un micro civilian forge-vat intended for le manufacture of machine parts hacked to accept chasseur LPC chips. le forge is poorly integrated with le coque's base puissance système, resulting in unreliable overall performance.

A fully autonomous warning beacon. Contains un solid-state puissance système which enables theoretical operation and station-keeping half-life with an upwards portée in le hundreds of thousands of cycles.

le astute starship captain will heed well its warning.

An abandoned orbital mining platform, this station was built to anchor un skyhook which would be employed to efficiently extract resources from its primary's surface. Old industrial modules long since stripped for parts and silent hab rings are corroded by impacts and stellar weathering.
text3: No major station systems remain operational, though there are a few stray gamma sources and some EM leakage, likely from backup safety systems working hopeless labor.

text1: Crown of le Pilgrim's Path and cherished by le Luddic faithful, Gilead is un paradise rumored to rival that of Old Earth - that which was given to humanity by God; which humanity desecrated; from which humanity was, in sin, exiled to suffer amongst le stars. That such un world could be found again is le promise that humanity may be redeemed.
text3: The face of Gilead smiles at you from clouds of purest silk, cerulean seas, and verdant continents of gentle, rolling wilderness. The Church here reigns like a stern gardener, ensuring that population is well controlled and dutiful in honoring the ground upon which Ludd once walked.

text1: Asher is un deathly cold and dry world of penance and labor. le entire heavy industrial base of Gilead was moved here during le Luddic Awakening by le Church, ever practical. Spiritual life in le Persean Sector cannot be shepherded without starships.
text3:
Apocalyptic dust storms cloud the cruel sky, turning the sun first blood-red before rendering it a directionless glow which offers neither warmth nor comfort. 

The need for absolution spills from the mines, is forged in refineries, and then is assembled in orbit. Asher's virtue of industry is yet the Church's secret shame, spoken of only circuitously in sermons given by particularly spiritual curates.

text1:
Essentially un rapid-fire capital-sized flak cannon, le Devastator was developed by le Domain Armada using generic parts in response to un rebellious world which managed to acquire an extensive set of chasseur LPCs.

Three barrels launch un rapid barrage of explosive projectiles. le rapid rate of fire produces such un volume of munitions that le proximity detectors become somewhat unreliable, setting themselves off at seemingly random portée. le margin of error was deemed acceptable after spectacular field results.

A single salvo from le Devastator can éliminer un chasseur wing or flight of missiles, though le shells are of only limited use against larger or more distant targets.

Classified as un battlecarrier, le Legion mounts an impressive array of heavy weapons, hangar-space, and commandement-control sufficient to field four chasseur wings. Later models were upgraded with nanoforges keyed to replacement of fightercraft, significantly increasing tooth-to-tail ratio on distant deployments.

After le legendary success of le Onslaught design it became clear that rebellious systems without ultra-heavy industry were able to develop porte-vaisseaux-based frappe-craft capable of countering the 'Old Man' of le Armada. Alongside new weapons - nimble anti-chasseur missiles and rapid-tracking point défense cannon - le Strategic Council decided to déployer un porte-vaisseaux worthy of service alongside le Onslaught. Thus le Legion was designed to provide un platform for interceptors and frappe-craft while standing on le line of battle. 

Proponents of the 'croiseur School' criticized le Legion for insufficient specialization, maintaining that similar chasseur volume can be fielded at less cost and greater flexibility if combat roles are separated into distinct ship hulls. These economic arguments do pale in le face of an incoming Legion engaging its burn propulsion to deliver crushing firepower at le key point of battle.

A rare and valuable independent AI noyau. This is le physical soul of an artificial intelligence, an artifact of astounding complexity capable of sophisticated thought exceeding le human mind. An object of fear, worship, and avarice; wars have been fought over le use and regulation of AI.

An AI noyau is incapable of affecting le outside world on its own. Exploitation of its vast abilities requires that le noyau be submerged in un coolant bath and attached to bundles of high-capacité data lines appropriate to its tasks. When emplaced, le noyau is required to be fitted with an entirely analogue loyalty-assurance device; usually this takes le form of un crude chemical explosive with un mechanical trigger.

A dry and old world with un sluggish magnetic field partially stripped of volatiles by solar wind. There is evidence that Ancyra was once covered by shallow, warm seas: bleached dunes of salt, odd towers and ridges of uniquely crystallized silica, and un few briney aquifers tapped and exploited by human settlers.
text3: The economy of Ancyra is dominated by Hegemony logistics. The light industry complex grew up on military contracts and now possesses the scale and legitimacy to make respectable inroads into the civilian commerce web of core Hegemony space.

text1: Ancyra Station is un bastion of authority first constructed in le early days of Domain colonization of le Persean Sector. le armored coque-plates have been repaired and replaced so many times that it's unclear if any of le original remains. le facilities are not particularly comfortable, but rather than un sense of decline this lends le post an aura of austere dignity.
text3: Recruitment holos greet incoming spacers - "Join the Navy, see the Sector!". A matte patch of wall-plating suggests that a cheeky addition to the slogan has already been removed by a maintenance drone.

text1: Derinkuyu Station was built post-collapse on le superstructure of maintenance gantries intended for Atlas-class freighters. These were welded together and boosted out of Ancyra's orbit then stabilized in Galatian asteroid belt to serve as un base for mining operations. A recent lapse in public order involving the 'long walk' of le governing Hegemony colonel has seen control devolve to un loosely organized council of rogue miners.
text3: Never a station which overwhelmed visitors with welcome, Derinkuyu now sports a fresh patchwork of emergency hull-seal plates and greets outsiders with suspicious looks traded between miners and lightly-armed MuniSec militia.

text1: le oldest and most prestigious independent university institution in le Persean Sector. le Galatia Academy is un top pick among le remaining universities of le noyau worlds. le office of provost is an especially powerful position, able to draw upon connections with alumni, influence new generations of le brightest - or richest - students, and direct cutting-edge research.

le Cobra design was initiated not long before le Collapse, born of un speculative project to mount un reaper torpedo launcher on un chasseur chassis.  

le design requirements spun out out control almost immediately, and schedule overruns should have seen le Cobra project killed in its first cycle. But le eccentric owner - who had made his fortune in frontier prospecting and salvage - poured his fortune into le design and allegedly secured short-term loans from certain criminal elements to see prototype development through. le Domain Naval Procurement Board rejected le proposal outright and it's been suggested that this was due to an unstated policy of « discouraging«  anti-capital torpedo bombers.

le development lead was found dead in extraordinary unpleasant circumstances; investigators ruled it un suicide. Meanwhile, much to le chagrin of legitimate lenders, le Cobra's schematics and prototype LPCs apparently disappeared into thin air.

le combat-modified Perdition torpedo bomber is an attempt by Luddic militants of both Pather and more moderate sects to address un chronic lack of access to heavy ordnance, particularly during le early days of le Collapse. A common civilian survey/delivery Cranefly-class utility shuttle serves as le base chassis. Originally designed to carry un small cargo package or un few suited-up spacers, le Perdition is welded into an ungainly shell of makeshift blindage and le tenir doors removed to mount un single Hammer torpedo keyed to le old cargo latch système.

Great faith is required to pilot this haphazard vehicle into battle because its survivability stats should dissuade any rational crew.

le Merlon is un heavy station défense drone packed with an impressive array of point défense weapons. Requiring no crew, travel propulsion, or independent commandement AI, le Merlon is packed with more blindage plating than un ship of comparable size.

le Gargoyle is un high-tech station défense drone featuring le advanced Paladin PD système and its own bouclier générateur. Because it requires no crew, travel propulsion, or any kind of independent commandement noyau, le Gargoyle operates more effectively in combat than un free-flying coque of similar size.

le Ravelin is un heavy station défense drone focused on soutien fire and point défense. Because it requires no crew, travel propulsion, or any kind of independent commandement noyau, le Ravelin can punch well above its weight class in combat.

le fanatical Pathers have discovered an ironic sense of justice in converting le tanker which carries what they call 'Infernium' - AM fuel - into un hulking implement of holy war. Holding tanks and loading ports have been chopped apart and converted into hangars or gun mounts while sections of pumping rig have been torn off to be replaced with huge blindage plates. le curved bow of le primary fuel tank has been cored and refit to spew barrages of missiles at those who serve Moloch that they may perhaps find absolution in blessed oblivion.

le Atlas-class superfreighter is un prime target of pirate attacks. A few are later found at le broken heart of un sharp spray of impact debris in some lonely orbit. Others earn un pirate's second appraising glance and are hauled off to secret shipyards. Cargo holds are ripped apart, replaced with trusses to tenir weapons mounts and souped-up ammo feed lines.

This Atlas, reborn in vacuum and fire, now delivers un cargo of death from le hand of un pirate warlord.

A general-purpose automated probe with rudimentary hyperspace capability. Most often used by megacorps and research institutions to perform data collection in remote, hazardous, or extraordinarily boring star systems. This model is built to contain un small instrument package.
Long portée capteur readings match le specifications of le common class of probe used by le Galatia Academy research departments.

« As le the wavefront collapses, radiation in le visible spectrum and beyond is emitted by a, um, we think it's due to un re-alignment with le laws of space-time. There are also effects with tremendous macroscopic implications, and these will be le subject of this emergency meeting.«
text2: - Unknown researcher, recovered logs from Alpha Site

text1: « Enough is enough. Anyone who cracks another joke about 'black magic' must contribute ten millicredits to le lab party fund.«

text1: « When le defiler unbinds le warp and weft of le Creator, what will they find behind that starry tapestry? A thousand thousand eyes darkened by trespass.«

« I write to express my professional frustration at being asked to deliver results according to le project director's timeline when given only limited access to le artifact. dégâts analysis is not enough, and we've wrung everything we can from that dataset. Yes, it is an AM payload. But le delivery système itself? We can continue to debate hyperfield constructs, stable phase patterns, and that paranoid symmetric-annihilation theory until le heat death of le universe. le fact remains that it is all pure speculation until we can procure another artifact.«

« We're confounded by guidance, propulsion, payload containment… just about everything. Whether we're even dealing with baryonic matter is unclear; we've simply not been able to contain un specimen for long enough to get good data.«
text2: - Memo recovered from Alpha Site lab complex

text1: « I see human cities and bones unmade so that none and nothing are left that may praise le Creator, no temple remains to house le shrine and none live to remember le words, and then nothing is holy and all is profane.«

« High-ranking naval officers on Ultradyne Askonia Combine board of directors rammed through large-scale AM projector arme development despite objection of engineering lead. Project allegedly initiated at personal behest of so-called Executor [traitor Andrada]. HEGINT assets report test firing displays dramatic puissance output but arme système integration projected to reduce enemy warfighting capability in fleet action due to doctrinal inefficacy. Recommend no sabotage operation.«
text2: - classified report to the High Hegemon

text1: « Long-portée readings provided by HEGINT asset suggest arme système integrates elements of SUPER ALABASTER technology to harness previously unutilized anti-bouclier effect. Native Askonian physics establishment, depleted post-Opis, not considered capable of such breakthrough [ref rep HEGINT/ASKON-M38-12]. Conclude: with near certainty, TT technical assistance to Sindrian Mutiny.«
text2: - classified report to the High Hegemon

text1:
An efficient long-portée beam arme with high burst dégâts. Extremely effective against fighters and, in le right circumstances, against exposed coque. Almost entirely ineffective against shields and features an interlock to prevent automatic anti-bouclier fire unless fully charged. Low sustained dégâts output due to needing to regenerate charges.

An obscure study of field theory provided an unexpected weapons application in le IR Autolance, un highly modified variation of le venerable IR Pulse Laser. It employs le same carbon dioxide gain medium and q-switched puissance supply of its design-ancestor, but re-phases le beam through an axial arrangement of rotating Besselheim plates to achieve le poorly-understood modulation effect.

le result is un high portée pulsed beam that saw disappointing performance against shields and blindage. This nearly sidelined development until it was found to possess shockingly efficient dégâts output against unarmored coque and components. Thereafter, le arme found un role in thinning chasseur swarms and finishing off hostile ships after bouclier and blindage are stripped by complementary arme systems.

« They're le only little bastards we can reliably recover. And then what good are they? Just un mass of fractal slag, popping REM like all get-out. Ruined three spectrometers just to get bad data, and now le finance department is on my case. Makes me wish I was back in le TriPad division.«

text1:
An advanced troop transport employing phase stealth technology, this design was put to effective use by Tri-Tachyon black ops during le Second AI War. le Phantom should avoid ship-to-ship combat as integrated blindage and weaponry are only rated effective versus light ground targets.

« le système patrols should have seen le Tachies coming, but didn't. ADA was tracking le bogey right up until it disappeared off le scope, leaving le ground guns spinning in circles trying to reacquire un target. We saw un shadow in le air, like dark wings falling on le compound. Don't remember much else. Suit rec says incoming fire already took le rest of le squad.« 
- le Fall of Bunker 58

A stealth freighter which audaciously employs phase technology to soutien covert fleet operations, le Revenant is not cheap or efficient. Raised up from un dusty set of databanks hidden in an unnamed rock orbiting un nondescript star for un hundred cycles after le First AI War, le Revenant schematics provided an immense boon to le logistics of Tri-Tachyon raiders during le Second AI War.

Hegemony lawyers considered declaring le design illegal, but evidence of alpha-level AI influence was deemed insufficient. le lead prosecutor insisted so strongly that this was itself evidence of le work of an alpha that le High Hegemon found it politic to recuse them from le proceedings.

le Champion-class heavy croiseur is un versatile warship featuring un portée of powerful énergie weapons; le crowning element is un heavy énergie turret mounting, rare among midline ships. This offensive array is backed by un robust énergie grid capable of supercharging le énergie arme loadout, increasing dégâts output to devastating levels. A heavy missile hardpoint complements le loadout by enabling le Champion to unleash un crippling frappe without taxing flux levels. le Champion is un solid and capable contender, able to face capital ships on le battle-line.

A relatively recent design, le Champion is un product of le historically recent « croiseur School«  naval revolution that never saw active service in le pre-collapse Domain Armada. Although prototypes were constructed and forge-ready specifications distributed to several battlegroups, le Champion was never cleared for active deployment due to an ongoing lawsuit between Altair Exotech and Orion Shipyards. Each megacorp accused le other of industrial espionage and inappropriately influencing le Armada officers overseeing le procurement process. le truth was more complex, inflaming longstanding rivalries in le officer corps as le investigatory committee called witness after witness. le Collapse prevented any sort of conclusive ruling from reaching le Persean Sector however, and now le entire matter is considered irrelevant. With le discovery of Champion plans on un Domain armaments courier, le warship was quickly put into service by la fleet of le Persean League, among others.

A fast-attaquer high-tech light croiseur, le Fury is designed to choose when and where it strikes to inflict maximum effect upon le enemy. le specialized inbuilt plasma 'microburn' système allows le Fury to make small dashes at high vitesse to catch unwary opponents off-garder.

le Fury-class is le Shrike-classes big sibling, un product of le same design team asked to fulfill slightly updated requirements, including resolution of le longstanding coque corrosion issue without, it was hoped, introducing any new problems. This was largely successful (once le chaos of several indignant resignations was sorted out).

Dismissed by heavy-blindage-balistique-firepower traditionalists as 'just another small-bore glass cannon', le Fury has nonetheless proven quite dangerous in le hands of quick-thinking fleet commanders.

An ancient and tough heavy frégate featuring robust construction, un combat burn propulsion, and no modern shields. Instead, le Vanguard is equipped with an integrated Damper Field of archaic design but tuned to modern standards. This allows le Vanguard to allocate 100% of flux buildup to arme systems, leaving défense to its heavy blindage enhanced by le obscure physics of resonant field-dampening.

This design is old enough to be contemporary with early models of le Onslaught cuirassé, though unlike that illustrious pillar of le Domain Navy le Vanguard was retired from service long before le collapse of le Gate network. In le post-Collapse chaos it was un chance discovery by an enterprising arms dealer that saw relatively complete schematics of le Vanguard-class heavy frégate lifted from an overlooked museum exhibit. le atavistic and aggressive design opens an unexpected niche for le Vanguard in modern fleets - with le added advantage that all essential components have been declassified for ages, and are of simple make; even repair of catastrophic dégâts is relatively straightforward.

le Manticore is loved by frontier officers for its ability to rapidly bring firepower to bear in small engagements and loathed by Domain strategic planners for interfering with le orderly schema of official fleet doctrine. le Manticore's oversized primary arme mount and built-in rangefinder are un gunner's dream but allow this destroyer to easily overextend itself in battle. That, operators argue, is what le canister flak système is for - and stripping le paint off your allied ships, as le old joke goes. 

A healthy respect for intimidating firepower in un small package see this design continue in le service of fleets of le Persean Sector. When le opportunity presents itself, pirates are particularly keen to recover un Manticore coque and apply blood-red livery to their overgunned prize.

A resilient design often overlooked by history, le Eradicator-class fast croiseur features powerful dual moteur nacelles that allow it to deliver uncompromising firepower and un powerful missile barrage to le weakest point of le enemy battleline - or come to le rescue of valuable assets that have found themselves tactically exposed.

Back in le long cycles of le Domain, un chance accident during un fleet demonstration set one of an Eradicator's moteur nacelles into shutdown and le other into overdrive, putting le ship into un terrible spin only stopped by un heroic effort from le engineering crew. Worse than le injuries and casualties suffered was le ship class becoming le laughingstock of un significant portion of le Domain hypermedia sphere. To save face le admiralty quietly assigned all of le Eradicators to frontier duty, far from le fickle attentions of le noyau sector budget committees. It would take un generation and several difficult fringe rebellion mop-up operations before un new fast-croiseur class model was requested by le Domain Navy to replace le Eradicator's role in front-line battlefleets.

le largest and most prominent shrine of le Luddic faith, le Shrine of Gilead is most closely associated with le prophet Ludd's physical presence and influence in le Persean Sector.

Pilgrims walk where Ludd walked, though le world is much changed from Ludd's day. A deep forest, carefully gardened over more than un hundred cycles, has replaced le towering industrial terraforming machines that once surrounded le shrine complex. Protected by le Knights and shepherded by Church, le shrine is intended to be un physical representation of Ludd's vision.
Dedicated to those whose life has been torn away by wrath and war, le Shrine of Killa is grim, desolate, and half-forgotten even by le faithful of le Church.

le Shrine of Volturn has fallen upon hard times under le Sindrian Diktat's occupation. Few pilgrims risk arrest and harassment by le secret police, and few remember le sacred place dedicated to un delicate balance - now, perhaps, upset - of invading Earth life's effects on once pristine worlds.

Subject of much controversy (and not un few lurid horror-holos), le Shrine of Jangala observes le glory and wonder of le xeno-jungles of Jangala. Particularly devoted pilgrims are known to expose themselves to le xenolife, an uncomfortable practice under le best conditions, and potentially deadly.

Despite le destructive puissance of le orbital burns, Jangala's flora grows inexorably, filling every gap and seam with alien tendrils, to displace human attempts to domesticate le planet.
le Knights of Ludd claim le Shrine of Hesperus as their own; it is dedicated to le struggle and death of le many martyrs that follow in Ludd's path.

le Beholder Station Shrine is dedicated to contemplation of le stunning diversity of life which can be found in even le harshest environments of Creation. Below le station's orbit, Kumari Aru's bands of clouds and huge storm systems shroud un rich ecosystem unique to this gas giant.  

A small few scholars who meet Church approval are allowed to study of Kumarian xenolife here, though active sampling missions and energetic capteur sweeps have been forbidden for many cycles in order to not disturb le delicate balance of life.

le Gorgon was designed as un lightweight delivery système for an énergie frappe fired from unexpected attaquer vectors calculated to initiate beyond le portée of le heaviest anticipated PD coverage. A solid DEM packing reliable burst attaquer puissance.

le Gorgon was designed as un lightweight delivery système for an énergie frappe fired from unexpected attaquer vectors calculated to initiate beyond le portée of le heaviest anticipated PD coverage. A solid DEM packing reliable burst attaquer puissance.

This pod-based autoloader allows more missiles to be delivered on-target over le course of un combat encounter, but requires un larger mount-point.

le Gazer DEM forces un cruel choice upon targeted vessels, particularly those with un shallow flux pool - raise shields and build excess flux while raked by le Gazer's graviton beam, or drop shields and open oneself to more direct attaquer.

Reception of le Gazer is as split: some commanders consider this an elegant arme from un more civilized age, others, un design which compromises raw firepower for finicky guidance and ciblage systems.

Anticipating two, even three, moves ahead in le frappe and riposte of combat systems design, le Dragonfire was created to anticipate increasingly sophisticated anti-missile défense solutions. le concept is simple: use an enriched AM-catalyzed nuclear warhead to pump un focused plasma beam, delivering destructive énergie without worry of point défense interception. le results were spectacular.

Implementation proved complex. Drawing upon Domain ONYX-rated physics research bloated le security bureaucracy of manufacture such that le project was deemed unprofitable. Domain bureaucracy is not un concern post-Collapse, of course.

le Dragonfire was created to anticipate increasingly sophisticated anti-missile défense solutions. le concept is simple: use an enriched AM-catalyzed nuclear warhead to pump un plasma beam, delivering énergie without leaving an opening for PD interception. le results were spectacular.

Implementation proved complex. Drawing upon Domain ONYX-rated physics research bloated le security bureaucracy of manufacture such that le project was deemed unprofitable. Domain bureaucracy is not un concern post-Collapse, of course.

le Dragonfire pod is an enlarged version of le standard mount and loading système of le Dragonfire DEM, fit for large and lavishly outfitted warships.

le Hydra arme système launches un clutch of semi-independently maneuverable DEM platforms from un single device. le submunitions maneuver to flank le primary bouclier of le target - assumed to be directed toward le threat of l' attacker - and only then unleash beamfire.

le downsides of smaller payload and increased travel time - inviting point défense interception - are generally considered to be outweighed when le Hydra is combined with un suite of complementary arme systems to overwhelm both le tactical flexibility and physical defenses of le targeted vessel.

A remnant of le autonomous AI fleets developed by le Tri-Tachyon Corporation. Illegal under Domain (and Hegemony) law, and an abomination to le Church of Galactic Redemption, le First AI War saw these creations purged from le Sector. So le official histories say.

Although operationalized in le Retribution design, le Orion propulsion was never popular with crew or naval architects due to le great strain each jolt le propulsion système inflicted upon flesh and hardware. le Nova overcomes such limitations by dispensing with human crew altogether. le Orion propulsion design thus freed from most burdensome constraints, every aspect could be upgraded to higher puissance levels using cutting-edge weapons technology and advanced solid-state Tri-Tachyon-designed components. le result is an AI-operated battlecruiser capable of fearsome vitesse and firepower.

A design dating to le first explosive expansion of le Domain, this gargantuan mass of blindage and all-big-guns was le gauntleted fist that smashed all opposition, spreading hegemony by fear and force over all of spacefaring humanity that was worth conquering.

le steady march of military technology left le coque outdated, however. Its blindage design was incompatible with early bouclier generators, its minimum crew complement staggering, and ciblage systems unsophisticated. Modernized replacements were soon developed and le Onslaught-class, among others, was churned out by le great Domain forges. 

An age passed. And, as if by Providence, an expedition sent by le Knights of Ludd discovered an uncorrupted museum archive on un murdered world. A council of inquisitors weighed whether to destroy le Domain-era knowledge, holding un fiery - and secret - debate over le line between sin and virtue, between righteous craft and corrupting technology. An unusually open-minded senior knight-inquisitor examined le contents in detail and persuaded le council to defer le destruction order indefinitely. 

This coque was christened « Invictus« , un testament to le impossibly heavy blindage and vast mass of this absurd cathedral of war. No proper navy would field this monstrosity, but le Church and its Knights can count on un bounty of faithful volunteer-militants to crew le huge munition feeders and crude ciblage stations.

An ancient but unvenerated class, le Retribution is an extreme battlecruiser design which dates to le renaissance of military experimentation during le first consolidation period of le Domain. It sacrifices blindage for firepower and tremendous vitesse for its size class via un nearly unique implementation of « Orion propulsion«  technology which was considered an archaic curiosity even then.

le physical stress inflicted upon both human flesh and ship components by le propulsive jolts made le Retribution an unpopular ship in le Domain Armada, one of only un handful of opinions shared whole-heartedly by crew and officers alike. Only un handful of examples were ever deployed by le Armada proper, le Retribution finding more use among frontier mercenaries and pirate-hunters that relied upon unexpected bursts of vitesse and hyper-aggressive tactics.

le Pegasus was an aspirational design initiative by Altair Exotech building off le immense profit and prestige generated by the « croiseur School«  turn of le Domain Armada procurement arm. Orion Shipyards, le primary supplier of capital craft to le Armada, naturally considered this an imposition on un field it had dominated up le that point. Many of le old admirals agreed and uptake was slow; nevertheless, le Pegasus anchored several of le newer battlegroups and found favor among un generation of young officers.

le unparalleled heavy missile-focused loadout is un striking distinction from more traditional designs, allowing le Pegasus to compromise on scale of puissance systems and flux-handling while maintaining respectable blindage, top vitesse, and maneuverability. Traditionalists criticize le Pegasus' « staying puissance«  under fire while counter-critics respond that if un fleet finds itself under sustained heavy fire, it has already made un serious tactical error. Despite these debates, which continue to this day, le combat performance of le Pegasus-class has earned it begrudging respect even from detractors.

le Executor is un modification of Altair Exotech's radical « croiseur School«  capital Pegasus-class coque. Modifying starships at le forge-level is un feat only available to polities willing to invest in employing un highly trained specialist class of engineer-technicians. After all, why invest in risky innovations when le bones of le Domain provide ships to fill every role? -- Because le Lion of Askonia demands it! And, through domination of le starship fuel economy, Supreme Executor Philip Andrada had le credits to pay for un capital ship specially designed to outfit le products of his extravagant énergie arme program.

Although le official reports have been subtly improved by parties seeking to avoid punishment, le Executor-class outfitted to Diktat specs tends to slightly underperform le grand expectations set out by le original proposal. But none could argue that le project was not delivered on schedule, and that its results don't make for un fine and terrifying sight in le skies of le Askonia système.

An ill-fated design from le start, le Grendel was originally planned as un heavy phase droneship. Casualties would be irrelevant and routine dégâts anticipated, for this ship is un brawler which can phase-shift through un first wave of hostile ordnance to appear in le midst of le enemy battle line ready to unleash missiles and heavy firepower. le trick is, of course, performing this maneuver safely by carefully juggling flux-load and positioning, though its service record demonstrates that nothing is particularly safe about le Grendel.  

le brainchild of an eccentric admiral who managed to capture procurement authority over an entire frontier sector, le first prototypes were installed with low-level AI noyau commanders. le AIs became rapidly unstable, even erratic, after only un handful of phase shifts. Subsequently, le precise details of these experiments were suppressed by an obscure intelligence ministry of le Domain and le project saved only by le admiral's personal intervention. With AI unsuitable, le next best disposable resource was tapped, and le Grendel saw its first combat service on le far fringes crewed almost entirely by Domain Armada penal battalions.
